bigDataAI.title: Big Data & AI Solutions
bigDataAI.subtitle: Unlock intelligent value from your data with machine learning and real-time analytics

hero.heading: Big Data & AI Solutions
hero.description: Transform raw data into intelligent decisions with end-to-end big data pipelines, machine learning models, and AI applications engineered for enterprise scale.

overview.heading: Service Overview
overview.description: Our Big Data & AI practice combines massive-scale data engineering with applied machine learning to help organizations capture, process, and act on information. From data ingestion to model deployment, we build secure, governed platforms that turn complexity into competitive advantage.

machineLearning.title: Machine Learning
machineLearning.description: Custom supervised and unsupervised models that learn from your data to automate decisions, detect anomalies, and forecast outcomes with measurable accuracy.

nlp.title: Natural Language Processing
nlp.description: Large language models and text analytics that extract intent, sentiment, and entities from documents, conversations, and customer feedback at scale.

computerVision.title: Computer Vision
computerVision.description: Image and video recognition systems for quality inspection, identity verification, and visual analytics powered by deep neural networks.

predictiveAnalytics.title: Predictive Analytics
predictiveAnalytics.description: Statistical and ML-driven forecasting that anticipates demand, churn, and risk so you can act before events unfold.

dataPipeline.title: Data Pipelines
dataPipeline.description: Resilient ingestion and ETL/ELT pipelines that move high-volume, high-velocity data from source systems into analytics-ready storage.

dataWarehouse.title: Data Warehouse
dataWarehouse.description: Cloud-native lakehouse and warehouse architectures that unify structured and semi-structured data under a single source of truth.

realTimeAnalytics.title: Real-Time Analytics
realTimeAnalytics.description: Stream processing frameworks that deliver sub-second insights and live dashboards over continuously arriving event data.

dataGovernance.title: Data Governance
dataGovernance.description: Lineage, cataloging, quality controls, and access policies that keep data trustworthy, compliant, and audit-ready.

finance.title: Financial Services

healthcare.title: Healthcare

smartCity.title: Smart City

design.title: Design

retailLending.title: Retail Lending Solution
retailLending.subtitle: A Digital Retail Lending Platform that automates the full credit lifecycle from onboarding to collection

hero.heading: Digital Retail Lending Platform
hero.description: Accelerate loan origination, risk decisioning, and lifecycle management with an end-to-end Digital Retail Lending Platform engineered for banks and fintechs.

overview.heading: Service Overview
overview.description: Our Retail Lending Solution combines a configurable risk engine, intelligent automation, and anti-fraud capabilities into a single platform. From digital onboarding to lifecycle servicing, we help financial institutions launch lending products faster while keeping cost, risk, and compliance under control.

riskEngine.title: Risk Engine
riskEngine.description: A configurable rules and scoring engine that prices and approves loans in real time, with multi-dimensional risk models tuned to your portfolio.

automation.title: Process Automation
automation.description: Automated workflows for application intake, verification, approval, and disbursement that cut manual handling and speed up time-to-cash.

antiFraud.title: Anti-Fraud
antiFraud.description: Device fingerprinting, behavioral analytics, and real-time interception that detect application fraud and money laundering across channels.

creditDecisioning.title: Credit Decisioning
creditDecisioning.description: Instant credit decisions powered by alternative data, bureau integration, and ML scorecards, with explainable outputs for every approval.

personal.title: Personal Lending
personal.description: Unsecured personal loans and installment credit with instant approval, dynamic pricing, and self-serve origination for consumers.

sme.title: SME Lending
sme.description: Working capital, term loans, and invoice financing for small and medium enterprises, with cash-flow-based underwriting and flexible drawdowns.

coLending.title: Co-Lending
coLending.description: Programmable co-lending and loan syndication that lets originators and partner banks share exposure, funding, and servicing on a single ledger.

baas.title: Banking-as-a-Service
baas.description: API-first core built on a Banking-as-a-Service layer, enabling new lending products, partners, and channels to plug in without re-platforming.

digitalOnboarding.title: Digital Onboarding
digitalOnboarding.description: eKYC, video verification, and OCR-based document capture that onboard borrowers in minutes with minimal friction and full audit trails.

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle Management
lifecycle.description: End-to-end servicing across disbursement, repayment, collections, and restructuring, with proactive alerts and customer self-service.

governance.title: Governance & Compliance
governance.description: Policy engines, audit logs, and regulatory reporting that keep lending operations compliant with lending and consumer-protection regulations.

consult.title: Consult
consult.description: We assess your lending products, risk appetite, and target segments to scope a high-impact platform initiative.

design.title: Design
design.description: We architect the risk engine, product catalogue, and integration map before any code is written.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.description: We build, integrate, and ship the platform into production with CI/CD, observability, and pilot support built in.

optimize.title: Optimize
optimize.description: We continuously tune scorecards, policies, and journeys as your loan book and data evolve.

cta.heading: Launch Lending, Faster
cta.description: Ready to deploy a Digital Retail Lending Platform? Let's design your roadmap together.
cta.ariaLabel: Request a consultation for the Retail Lending Solution

retailCredit.title: Retail Lending
retailCredit.description: A Digital Retail Lending Platform that automates origination, risk decisioning, and lifecycle management for banks and fintechs.

bigDataAI.title: Big Data & AI
bigDataAI.description: Machine learning, predictive analytics, and governed data platforms that turn raw data into intelligent action.

projectManagement.title: Project Management
projectManagement.description: Agile delivery at scale for complex financial technology programs.

services.title: Core Services
services.subtitle: Empowering financial innovation with frontier technology

pm.title: Project Management
pm.subtitle: Professional fintech program delivery from discovery to long-term support

overview.title: Service Overview
overview.content: We deliver end-to-end project management for financial technology initiatives, combining agile coaching, governance, risk control, and compliance to ship regulated products on time, on budget, and to spec.

agile.title: Agile Delivery
agile.description: Scrum, Kanban, and SAFe practices that ship working software in short, predictable iterations.

waterfall.title: Waterfall Delivery
waterfall.description: Phase-gated delivery for fixed-scope, compliance-heavy programs that require formal sign-offs.

hybrid.title: Hybrid Model
hybrid.description: Blended agile and waterfall approaches tailored to each program's risk, scope, and regulatory profile.

risk.title: Risk Management
risk.description: Structured risk registers, mitigation plans, and escalation paths that keep programs resilient.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We align on goals, scope, stakeholders, and success metrics before any commitment.

planning.title: Planning
planning.description: We build the roadmap, release plan, budget, and governance model.

execution.title: Execution
execution.description: We run iterations, track velocity, and manage scope, quality, and risk day to day.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.description: We ship, validate, and hand over with documentation, training, and sign-off.

support.title: Support
support.description: We provide hypercare, maintenance, and continuous improvement after launch.

cta.title: Deliver Your Next Program with Confidence
cta.subtitle: Talk to us about program delivery tailored to your fintech initiatives.

crossBorderPayment.title: Cross-Border Payment Solution
crossBorderPayment.subtitle: A regulated cross-border payment rail connecting fiat and digital-asset corridors for banks, fintechs, and enterprises

hero.heading: Regulated Cross-Border Payment Rails
hero.description: Move value across borders in minutes on regulated payment rails that connect fiat settlement, correspondent banking, and digital-asset liquidity on a single platform.

overview.heading: Service Overview
overview.description: Our Cross-Border Payment Solution unifies correspondent banking rails, real-time payment networks, and regulated digital-asset corridors so financial institutions can settle multi-currency payments faster, cheaper, and with full compliance. Built-in sanctions screening, travel-rule handling, and FX management keep every payment audit-ready end to end.

c1.title: Multi-Rail Settlement
c1.description: Orchestrate payments across SWIFT, real-time payment networks, stablecoin rails, and correspondent banks from one API layer, with smart routing by cost, speed, and corridor.

c2.title: Real-Time FX & Liquidity
c2.description: Live FX pricing, multi-currency liquidity pools, and pre-funded or on-demand settlement that compress remittance windows from days to minutes.

c3.title: Compliance & Screening
c3.description: Sanctions screening, transaction monitoring, and travel-rule messaging integrated into the payment flow, with full audit trails for every leg of the journey.

corridors.title: Multi-Currency Corridors
corridors.description: Pre-built payment corridors across major remittance and trade lanes, covering inbound and outbound flows with locally optimized settlement paths.

settlement.title: Fast Settlement
settlement.description: Near real-time settlement across connected rails, reducing beneficiary wait times from days to minutes on supported corridors.

fxOrchestration.title: FX Orchestration
fxOrchestration.description: Centralized FX management with live rate sourcing, configurable spreads, and automated hedging handoffs to treasury for exposure control.

valueAdded.title: Value-Added Services
valueAdded.description: Remittance information, purpose-of-payment validation, and beneficiary verification layered onto every payment for transparency and reconciliation.

apiLayer.title: Unified API Layer
apiLayer.description: A single REST and webhook API that abstracts SWIFT, RTP networks, stablecoin rails, and correspondent banks behind consistent payment objects.

complianceEngine.title: Compliance Engine
complianceEngine.description: Embedded sanctions screening, transaction monitoring, and travel-rule messaging that execute inside the payment flow with full audit trails.

reconciliation.title: Reconciliation
reconciliation.description: Daily reconciliation with independent attestation, matching ledger entries against rail confirmations and on-chain settlements end to end.

integration.title: Core-Banking Integration
integration.description: Pre-built connectors for core banking and treasury systems, with event-driven webhooks that plug cross-border flows into existing back offices.

cta.heading: Modernize Your Cross-Border Payments
cta.description: Ready to consolidate your cross-border payment rails onto one compliant platform? Let's design your corridor roadmap together.
cta.ariaLabel: Request a consultation for the Cross-Border Payment Solution

digitalAssetCustody.title: Digital Asset Custody Solution
digitalAssetCustody.subtitle: Institutional-grade custody for digital assets with MPC key management, regulated segregation, and on-chain settlement

hero.heading: Institutional Digital-Asset Custody
hero.description: Safeguard institutional digital assets with multi-party-computation key management, regulated segregation of duties, and on-chain settlement engineered for banks, asset managers, and exchanges.

overview.heading: Service Overview
overview.description: Our Digital Asset Custody Solution combines hardware-backed MPC key management, HSM-secured cold storage, and policy-driven governance into a regulated custody platform. From on-chain settlement to fund administration, we help institutions hold, transfer, and report digital assets with the controls and transparency regulators require.

c1.title: MPC Key Management
c1.description: Threshold signatures across hardware-backed nodes that eliminate single points of key compromise while keeping signing latency low for production workflows.

c2.title: Regulated Segregation
c2.description: Segregated wallet structures, bankruptcy-remote account models, and reconciliation against the chain that meet institutional and regulatory custody standards.

c3.title: On-Chain Settlement & Reporting
c3.description: Native on-chain settlement with automated proof-of-reserves, NAV reporting, and audit exports for fund administrators and regulators.

walletArchitecture.title: Wallet Architecture
walletArchitecture.description: Hierarchical wallet structures with segregated warm and cold tiers, designed to balance day-to-day operational access with hardened long-term storage.

keyGovernance.title: Key Governance
keyGovernance.description: Policy-driven approval workflows with quorum controls, role separation, and full audit trails over every signing and key-rotation event.

settlementReporting.title: Settlement & Reporting
settlementReporting.description: Native on-chain settlement paired with automated NAV, proof-of-reserves, and audit exports that keep fund administrators and regulators in sync.

assetSupport.title: Asset Support
assetSupport.description: Custody for major digital assets across multiple chains, with structured onboarding for new tokens as institutional demand and compliance allow.

mpcStack.title: MPC Stack
mpcStack.description: Multi-party-computation threshold signatures across hardware-backed nodes that eliminate single points of key compromise while keeping signing latency low.

policyEngine.title: Policy Engine
policyEngine.description: A configurable policy engine enforcing transaction limits, allowlists, and multi-party approvals before any signing request is authorized.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connectors for trading venues, OTC desks, and fund-administration platforms so custodied assets move smoothly across institutional workflows.

observability.title: Observability
observability.description: End-to-end transaction and key-event logging with tamper-evident audit trails, enabling investigation, reconciliation, and regulatory reporting.

cta.heading: Custody Digital Assets With Confidence
cta.description: Ready to launch an institutional digital-asset custody program? Let's design your governance and key-management architecture together.
cta.ariaLabel: Request a consultation for the Digital Asset Custody Solution

stablecoin.title: Stablecoin Solution
stablecoin.subtitle: A regulated stablecoin issuance platform with reserve management, redemption rails, and on-chain programmability for banks and fintechs

hero.heading: Regulated Stablecoin Issuance
hero.description: Issue and operate a regulated stablecoin with transparent reserve management, instant redemption rails, and programmable on-chain money movement built for banks and licensed issuers.

overview.heading: Service Overview
overview.description: Our Stablecoin Solution covers the full issuance lifecycle: reserve custody and attestation, mint and burn controls, redemption rails, and on-chain programmability. We help banks and fintechs launch fiat-backed stablecoins that satisfy monetary-authority requirements while enabling fast, composable, cross-chain payments.

c1.title: Reserve Management
c1.description: Segregated reserve custody with daily reconciliation and independent attestation so every token in circulation is backed 1:1 by high-quality liquid assets.

c2.title: Mint, Burn & Redeem Rails
c2.description: Policy-driven mint/burn APIs, KYC-anchored redemption flows, and integration with banking rails so issuers can move between fiat and stablecoin on demand.

c3.title: On-Chain Programmability
c3.description: Multi-chain issuance, smart-contract-based compliance controls, and composable payment rails that plug stablecoin liquidity into wallets, exchanges, and merchant networks.

reserveOps.title: Reserve Operations
reserveOps.description: Segregated reserve custody with daily reconciliation and independent attestation, keeping every token in circulation backed by high-quality liquid assets.

mintBurnRails.title: Mint & Burn Rails
mintBurnRails.description: Policy-driven mint and burn controls anchored to KYC-verified accounts, with transparent on-chain records of every supply change.

redemptionOps.title: Redemption Operations
redemptionOps.description: On-demand redemption rails that return fiat to verified holders, with banking-rail integration and clear redemption windows.

programmability.title: Programmability
programmability.description: Smart-contract-based compliance controls and composable payment primitives that embed policy directly into stablecoin money movement.

issuancePlatform.title: Issuance Platform
issuancePlatform.description: A managed issuance platform covering mint/burn orchestration, reserve accounting, and operator console for licensed stablecoin issuers.

complianceMonitoring.title: Compliance Monitoring
complianceMonitoring.description: Continuous on-chain monitoring for sanctioned addresses, freeze/seize controls, and travel-rule capture aligned to jurisdictional requirements.

chainInterop.title: Chain Interoperability
chainInterop.description: Native bridging across supported chains with consistent identity and compliance state, so stablecoin liquidity moves without policy gaps.

treasuryOps.title: Treasury Operations
treasuryOps.description: Reserve and treasury tooling with automated reconciliation, liquidity forecasting, and audit exports for monetary-authority reporting.

cta.heading: Launch a Regulated Stablecoin
cta.description: Ready to issue a regulated stablecoin? Let's design your reserve, redemption, and on-chain architecture together.
cta.ariaLabel: Request a consultation for the Stablecoin Solution

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How KTech collects, uses, and protects your personal data
privacy.disclaimer: This is a template privacy policy. Please consult legal counsel before production use.

intro.heading: Introduction
intro.description: KTech AI ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services. This policy complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA).

collection.heading: Information We Collect
collection.description: We collect information you provide directly to us and information collected automatically when you use our services.

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.description: Name, email address, phone number, company name, and job title that you provide via contact or registration forms.

usage.title: Usage Data
usage.description: IP address, browser type, operating system, pages visited, referral URLs, and timestamps collected automatically through cookies and server logs.

cookies.title: Cookie Data
cookies.description: Identifiers stored on your device to remember preferences, authenticate sessions, and analyze traffic patterns.

financial.title: Financial Data
financial.description: Aggregated and anonymized financial metrics required to deliver our supply chain finance and credit solutions, processed strictly under lawful basis.

cookies.heading: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to operate and improve our services.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: Required for the website to function correctly. These cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website so we can improve performance and user experience.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: Used to deliver relevant advertisements. You may opt out of these at any time.

use.heading: How We Use Your Data
use.description: We process your personal data for the following legitimate purposes:

items.service: Providing, operating, and maintaining our financial technology services
items.improve: Improving, personalizing, and expanding our services based on your feedback and usage
items.communicate: Responding to your comments, questions, and customer service requests
items.security: Monitoring and analyzing usage to detect, prevent, and address technical issues, fraud, and security threats
items.compliance: Complying with legal obligations and protecting our legitimate business interests

rights.heading: Your Rights (GDPR / CCPA)
rights.description: Under GDPR and CCPA, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

access.title: Right of Access
access.description: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.

rectification.title: Right to Rectification
rectification.description: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal data.

erasure.title: Right to Erasure
erasure.description: Request deletion of your personal data (the right to be forgotten).

portability.title: Right to Data Portability
portability.description: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format and transmit it to another controller.

object.title: Right to Object
object.description: Object to the processing of your personal data for marketing or other legitimate-interest purposes.

restrict.title: Right to Restrict Processing
restrict.description: Request that we limit the processing of your personal data under certain conditions.

rights.exerciseNote: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@ktech.fintech. We will respond within 30 days.

retention.heading: Data Retention
retention.description: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements. Data is then securely deleted or anonymized.

thirdParty.heading: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.description: We may share data with trusted third-party service providers who help us operate our business:

items.analytics: Web analytics platforms used to understand site usage
items.legal: Legal and financial advisors when legally required

thirdParty.note: These parties are contractually obligated to protect your data and use it only for the purposes we specify.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data protection rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer.
contact.address: Address: 开泰远景信息科技有限公司, Luohu District, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China 518000

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The terms and conditions that govern your use of KTech services
terms.disclaimer: This is a template terms of service. Please consult legal counsel before production use.

intro.heading: Introduction
intro.description: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the KTech AI website, platform, and services (the "Services") operated by KTech AI ("we", "us", or "our"). By using our Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, you must not access or use our Services.

acceptance.heading: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.description: By accessing or using the Services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy.

byAccess.title: Agreement by Access
byAccess.description: Your use of the Services constitutes your acceptance of these Terms, whether or not you create an account.

amendments.title: Amendments
amendments.description: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

rejection.title: Right to Reject
rejection.description: If you do not agree to the revised Terms, you must stop using the Services before the changes take effect.

responsibilities.heading: User Responsibilities
responsibilities.description: You agree to the following responsibilities when using our Services:

items.accurate: Providing accurate, current, and complete information when creating an account or submitting data
items.compliance: Complying with all applicable laws, regulations, and third-party agreements
items.security: Maintaining the confidentiality and security of your account credentials and promptly notifying us of any unauthorized access
items.prohibited: Not using the Services to engage in any unlawful, fraudulent, abusive, or infringing activity
items.fees: Paying any applicable fees for premium services as described at the point of purchase

liability.heading: Limitation of Liability
liability.description: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the following limitations apply to your use of the Services:

asIs.title: As-Is Basis
asIs.description: The Services are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without warranties of any kind, express or implied.

noIndirect.title: No Indirect Damages
noIndirect.description: We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Services.

cap.title: Liability Cap
cap.description: Our total aggregate liability for any claim is limited to the amount you paid us in the twelve months preceding the claim, or one hundred US dollars, whichever is greater.

ip.heading: Intellectual Property
ip.description: The following provisions govern ownership of intellectual property in connection with the Services:

platform.title: Platform Materials
platform.description: The Services, including software, designs, logos, and content, are owned by us and protected by intellectual property laws.

userContent.title: User Content
userContent.description: You retain ownership of content you submit to the Services and grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive license to use it solely to operate and improve the Services.

license.title: Limited License
license.description: We grant you a personal, non-transferable, revocable license to access and use the Services in accordance with these Terms.

termination.heading: Termination
termination.description: You may stop using the Services at any time. We may suspend or terminate your access under the following circumstances:

items.byUser: You may close your account or discontinue use at any time without notice
items.byUs: We may suspend or terminate access immediately if you breach these Terms or engage in prohibited activity
items.effect: Upon termination, all licenses and rights granted to you cease, and you must stop using the Services

termination.note: Surviving provisions such as intellectual property, limitation of liability, and dispute resolution remain in effect after termination.

dispute.heading: Dispute Resolution
dispute.description: We are committed to resolving disputes amicably and efficiently through the following process:

negotiation.title: Negotiation
negotiation.description: The parties shall first attempt to resolve any dispute through good-faith negotiation within thirty days.

mediation.title: Mediation
mediation.description: If negotiation fails, the parties agree to attempt resolution through a mutually selected mediator.

arbitration.title: Arbitration
arbitration.description: Any unresolved dispute shall be submitted to final and binding arbitration conducted in accordance with the applicable arbitration rules.

governing.heading: Governing Law
governing.description: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the People's Republic of China, without regard to its conflict of law principles. The courts of Shenzhen, Guangdong shall have exclusive jurisdiction over any disputes arising from these Terms.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact our legal team.
contact.address: Address: 开泰远景信息科技有限公司, Luohu District, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China 518000

hero.title: KaiTech
hero.subtitle: KBRIGHT FINTECH
hero.description: KASIKORN VISION INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY Co., Ltd. (KTech) was established in Luohu District, Shenzhen in June 2020 by Thailand's KASIKORN Bank Group, with a registered capital of RMB 300 million. It is among the first batch of multinational-company headquarters enterprises recognized by Shenzhen.

culture.title: Vision · Mission · Culture
culture.visionDesc: Become a leading regional fintech platform
culture.valuesDesc:
Customer First · Open Collaboration
Agile Innovation · Professional Excellence

hero.title: Enterprise
hero.subtitle: Distributed ledger platforms engineered for trust, traceability, and programmable finance across regulated ecosystems.

overview.title: Service Overview
overview.description: Our blockchain practice designs and ships production-grade distributed-ledger systems for financial institutions, combining consensus design, smart-contract engineering, and enterprise integration with the governance regulated industries demand.
overview.detail: From supply-chain finance and cross-border payments to tokenized assets and audit-ready registries, we build ledgers that turn trust into a verifiable, automated substrate.

distributed.title: Distributed Architecture
distributed.description: Decentralized nodes eliminate single points of failure and keep data available even under partial outages.

security.title: Cryptographic Security
security.description: Hash chaining, digital signatures, and permissioned access controls protect data integrity at every block.

efficiency.title: Operational Efficiency
efficiency.description: Smart contracts automate settlement, reconciliation, and compliance checks without manual intermediaries.

traceability.title: Full Traceability
traceability.description: Immutable, time-stamped records give auditors and regulators an end-to-end view of every transaction.

trust.title: Strengthened Trust
trust.description: Shared, tamper-evident ledgers let counterparties transact with confidence and lower verification overhead.

cost.title: Reduced Cost
cost.description: Automating reconciliation and removing intermediaries cuts processing cost across the value chain.

speed.title: Faster Settlement
speed.description: Smart-contract-driven settlement compresses multi-day processes into minutes.

cta.title: Build Your Blockchain Foundation
cta.description: Ready to design a distributed-ledger platform tailored to your business? Let's map the roadmap together.
cta.ariaLabel: Request a consultation for blockchain solutions

joinUs.title: Join
joinUs.subtitle: Build the future of fintech with us. Join a team of innovators shaping next-generation financial intelligence.

culture.title: Our Culture
culture.description: We foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning. Every team member contributes to our mission of advancing financial intelligence.

innovation.title: Innovation First
innovation.description: We embrace cutting-edge technology and push the boundaries of what's possible in fintech.

teamwork.title: Collaborative Spirit
teamwork.description: Great products are built together. We believe in diverse perspectives and inclusive teamwork.

creativity.title: Creative Freedom
creativity.description: We encourage creative thinking and provide the freedom to explore new ideas and solutions.

growth.title: Continuous Growth
growth.description: Your growth matters. We offer learning opportunities and clear career advancement pathways.

competitive.title: Competitive Salary
competitive.description: Industry-leading compensation packages based on experience and market benchmarks.

development.title: Professional Development
development.description: Continuous learning, conferences, workshops, and skill-enhancement programs.

balance.title: Work-Life Balance
balance.description: Flexible working arrangements and a supportive environment for personal well-being.

health.title: Health Insurance
health.description: Comprehensive health coverage including medical, dental, and vision insurance.

activities.title: Team Activities
activities.description: Regular team-building events, hackathons, and social gatherings.

career.title: Career Growth
career.description: Clear progression paths with mentorship and internal mobility opportunities.

positions.title: Open Positions
positions.subtitle: Explore our current openings and find your place on the team.

step1.title: Apply Online
step1.description: Submit your application through our portal with your resume and cover letter.

step2.title: Initial Screening
step2.description: Our team reviews your application and contacts shortlisted candidates for an initial discussion.

step3.title: Interviews
step3.description: Meet with our team to discuss your skills, experience, and mutual fit.

step4.title: Welcome Aboard
step4.description: Receive an offer and join our team to start building the future together.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have questions about working at KTech? We'd love to hear from you.

hero.title: Mobile
hero.subtitle: Native and cross-platform mobile financial applications engineered for security, speed, and delightful user experience.

overview.title: Service Overview
overview.description: We design, build, and ship mobile financial applications end to end, from discovery and UX to release and continuous improvement.
overview.card1Desc: Platform-native builds that deliver smooth animations and responsive interactions on every device.
overview.card2Desc: Encryption, secure key storage, and biometric authentication protect every transaction.
overview.card3Desc: Live data, instant notifications, and low-latency sync keep users connected.

features.title: Key Features
features.feature1Desc: Unified dashboards for balances, transactions, and linked accounts.
features.feature2Desc: Fast, secure transfers with multi-factor authentication.
features.feature3Desc: Face ID and fingerprint access for frictionless, secure sign-in.
features.feature4Desc: Real-time alerts for transactions, due dates, and fraud detection.
features.feature5Desc: AI-driven categorization and analytics of personal finances.
features.feature6Desc: Chat and self-service help integrated directly into the app.

benefits.title: Benefits
benefits.description: Why teams choose our mobile fintech delivery:
benefits.benefit1: Faster time-to-market with reusable fintech components
benefits.benefit2: Compliant with financial regulations and standards
benefits.benefit3: Consistent experience across iOS and Android
benefits.benefit4: Modular architecture for rapid feature iteration
benefits.benefit6: Localized for multiple markets and languages

cta.title: Launch Your Mobile FinTech App
cta.description: Ready to build a secure, scalable mobile financial product? Let's talk.

launcher.label: AI Neural Terminal
launcher.ariaLabel: Open AI Neural Terminal command console

terminal.placeholder: Type a command, then press Enter (try: help)
terminal.intro: Neural link established. Type 'help' to list available commands.

errors.unknown: command not found: {cmd}. Type 'help' for the command list.

help.response: Available commands: help, about, services, ai, news, contact, clear. Easter eggs hidden in the grid. The terminal is watching.

about.response: KTech AI Cyber: a China-based technology subsidiary of KASIKORNBANK (KBank). We fuse blockchain, cross-border payment, digital asset custody, stablecoin, big data and retail lending into one fintech nervous system. Determined to become a leading fintech company in China and ASEAN.

services.response: Service stack online: blockchain infrastructure, cross-border payment rails, digital asset custody, stablecoin issuance, supply-chain finance, retail lending, big-data risk intelligence. Each module is hot-swappable.

ai.response: AI layer: neural risk scoring, anomaly detection across transaction graphs, natural-language compliance review, predictive liquidity routing. Models retrain on the live ledger every cycle.

news.response: Latest signal: KTech continues expanding ASEAN corridors and deepening custody + stablecoin rails. Visit the News channel for full transmissions.

contact.response: Open a channel: visit the Contact page, or transmit to ops@ktech.ai. Encrypted lines preferred. We answer within one cycle.

sudo.response: Nice try, guest. Root access is reserved for the architects. Your attempt has been logged into the grid.

coffee.response: Brewing synthetic espresso ... 99% caffeine, 1% neon. The neural core runs faster now.

hackplanet.response: HACK THE PLANET. The grid lights up. You feel the data flow through you.

konami.response: ↑↑↓↓←→←→BA. Konami code accepted. 30 extra cycles granted to this session.

neural.title: KTech AI Core
neural.subtitle: Live neural inference — watch the network think

aria.regionLabel: KTech AI Core neural network visualizer
aria.description: An interactive neural network. Hover or focus a node to inspect its layer and function. Activate Run Inference to watch a data packet propagate to a decoded decision.

forge.title: AI Solution Forge
forge.subtitle: Configure your needs — forge a deployment-ready blueprint

aria.description: An interactive configurator. Pick an industry, set a scale, and toggle priority drivers; activate Forge to generate a deployment blueprint with recommended services, metrics, and a verdict. Outputs are deterministic and illustrative, not live system data.

opsHud.title: Cyber Ops HUD
opsHud.subtitle: Real-time mission control

aria.regionLabel: Cyber Ops HUD interactive mission-control dashboard
aria.description: An interactive mission-control dashboard. Watch live uptime, latency and throughput gauges, filter the event feed by category, and investigate AI anomaly alerts. Pulse the network to spike all metrics. All data is simulated locally and illustrative, not live system data.
aria.pulseButton: Pulse the network: spike all metrics
aria.investigateButton: Investigate this anomaly: open the drill-down

events.ai_2: Anomaly detector retrained on new samples
events.anomaly: AI anomaly detected — request pattern deviation

anomaly.title: AI Anomaly Detected
anomaly.drilldown: Investigating request-pattern deviation across the AI gateway. Correlating latency burst with model-inference queue depth.

opsHud.reducedMotion: Reduced-motion mode: static readouts, animations paused.

notice.micDenied: Microphone access denied — falling back to synth.
notice.reducedMotion: Reduced motion: visual effects are disabled.
notice.iosAudio: Note: on iOS, audio may require the device ringer to be unmuted before engaging.

aria.description: A live audio-reactive light show. Engage to begin; choose an input source and a visual mode.

dashboard.title: Performance monitor
dashboard.description: Real-user Core Web Vitals for this page. Metrics are collected locally and sent only if an endpoint is configured.
